name: Flow-02-EscalateToPlanningAgent
description: Triggered by INT-02 (Fast-Track/Escalation) or when sentiment score falls below threshold. Routes the case to the Planning Officer queue and prepares Copilot context for the agent.

steps.name: GetCitizenDetails
steps.description: Retrieve the citizen contact record linked to the case.

steps.name: PrepareCopilotBriefing
steps.description: Generate an agent briefing using Copilot.

parameters.systemPrompt: You are a planning officer assistant. Prepare a concise briefing for the agent including case summary, citizen details, and relevant policy considerations.
parameters.userPrompt: Case: {caseRecord.ticketnumber}. Citizen: {citizenRecord.fullname}. Summary: {caseRecord.ombudlens_aisummary}. Escalation reason: {escalationReason}. Sentiment: {sentimentScore}.

steps.name: UpdateCaseWithBriefing
steps.description: Update the case AI summary with the agent briefing.

steps.name: RouteToQueue
steps.description: Route the active conversation/case to the Planning Officer queue.

outputs.name: assignedAgentId
outputs.description: System User ID of the assigned planning agent
